title: WELL Four-Mirror State Schema
description: Enumerated states for H-WELL, M-WELL, G-WELL, C-WELL. Weakest substrate gates all decisions.

H_WELL.description: Human substrate — human-origin evidence only. Baseline-relative. Non-medical.

CRITICAL.requires: sovereign self-report critical OR medical signal

M_WELL.description: Machine substrate — VPS physics only. No psychologizing the operator.

STABLE.requires: CPU <70%, memory <80%, disk <80%, no container crashes

STRAINED.requires: 1 metric above threshold OR tool latency >2s

CRITICAL.requires: disk >95% OR memory >95% OR multiple organs down

G_WELL.description: Governance coherence — F1-F13 floors, epistemic hygiene, amanah.

COHERENT.requires: all floors pass, no contradictions, evidence tagged

DRIFTING.requires: identity drift detected OR seal chain gap

C_WELL.description: Coupled human-machine state — interaction risk, not identity collapse.

HIGH_RISK.requires: H=CRITICAL OR M=CRITICAL OR G=COMPROMISED OR 2+ degraded

HOLD.requires: sovereign ack OR all substrates recovered

gate_rule.description: Weakest substrate determines the response. Floor dominance — same as constitutional floors.

REDUCE_LOAD.blocked: C4 irreversible, new dependencies, prod deploy

RECOVER.blocked: all mutations, all seals, all deploys

INSUFFICIENT_DATA.action: request sovereign inject or wait for sensor

receipt_policy.H_WELL_receipts: expire after 24h unless explicitly pinned by sovereign
receipt_policy.C_WELL_receipts: store episodes only, not continuous traces
receipt_policy.G_WELL_receipts: every time human-origin evidence gates machine action
receipt_policy.raw_biometrics: never leave local disk; agent receives derived states only

peace_condition.description: Peace = recoverable homeostasis with preserved sovereignty
peace_condition.formula: H.recovery_capacity AND (M.stable OR M.safely_degraded) AND G.coherent AND C.low_escalation
peace_condition.not: permanent calm, obedient behavior, optimized predictability
